title: LIVE: EU leaders arrive in Brussels to talk Middle East, Ukraine, and energy
summary_full: Initially billed as the summit to tackle Europe's industrial competitiveness, the leaders' meeting on Thursday will be overshadowed by a Hungary-Ukraine stand-off and the war in Iran
summary_public: Initially billed as the summit to tackle Europe's industrial competitiveness, the leaders' meeting on Thursday will be overshadowed by a Hungary-Ukraine stand-off and the war in Iran
